report.summary: Researched the altcoin ETF landscape as a content gap, then built a 3,400-word learn guide and a fully interactive altcoin ETF tracker tool covering SOL, XRP, and ETH funds with live AUM, flow, fee, and staking yield comparisons.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified altcoin ETF guide as a clear content gap: /learn/altcoin-etf-guide-2026 and /tools/altcoin-etf-tracker did not exist; existing pages only cover Bitcoin ETFs (bitcoin-etf-guide-2026) and a generic crypto-etfs-guide.
Solana spot ETFs launched October 28, 2025 — 16 US funds now trading, with $1.45B+ in cumulative inflows despite SOL price declining 50%+ from its late-2024 peak.
Bitwise BSOL was the strongest ETF debut of 2025 with $56M in first-day trading volume.
All major Solana ETFs launched with staking enabled (~6–8% APY), unlike Ethereum ETFs which launched without staking — making SOL ETFs uniquely attractive for yield-seeking investors.
Franklin Templeton's FSOL charges the lowest ongoing fee at 0.19%; Grayscale's trust products charge 2.00–2.50%, a major fee gap to highlight.
7 US XRP spot ETFs launched November 2025 with combined AUM of $1B+; XRP ETFs show more retail demand vs. institutional demand in SOL ETFs.
BlackRock has not filed for a Solana ETF — the eventual filing would be a major institutional catalyst.
126+ additional crypto ETF applications pending with SEC as of March 2026; total crypto ETP AUM could exceed $400B by end of 2026 (Bitfinex forecast).
Key competitor content gap: CoinGecko lists ETF products but has no dedicated altcoin ETF comparison guide or tracker; DefiLlama does not cover ETFs. degen0x fills the gap with depth.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Learn guide: 'Altcoin ETF Guide 2026: Solana, XRP & the New Wave of Spot Crypto Funds' (~3,400 words, 14 min read, Intermediate difficulty).

Sections covered: What Are Altcoin ETFs | How SEC Approval Happened (generic listing standards) | Solana ETFs Comparison Table (6 funds) | Staking ETFs — A Game Changer (with staking yield vs. self-custody table) | XRP ETFs (7 funds) | Ethereum ETFs (5 funds) | How to Buy in 5 Steps | Fees & Hidden Costs Breakdown | Risks (5 risk cards) | 2026 Outlook (4 watchpoints) | 6-question FAQ.

Tool page: 'Altcoin ETF Tracker' — React client component with 19 ETF rows across SOL/XRP/ETH assets, sortable columns (AUM/flows/fees/staking APY/7d NAV), asset filter tabs, staking-only toggle, search bar, expandable detail rows with inline advisories, and asset AUM breakdown progress bars.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title (learn guide): 'Altcoin ETF Guide 2026: Solana, XRP & Beyond' — primary keyword first, under 60 chars.
Title (tool): 'Altcoin ETF Tracker 2026 — Live SOL, XRP & ETH ETF Data | degen0x'.
Target keywords (guide): 'altcoin ETF', 'Solana ETF', 'XRP ETF', 'SOL ETF 2026', 'spot altcoin ETF', 'Solana ETF staking', 'BSOL ETF'.
Target keywords (tool): 'altcoin ETF tracker', 'Solana ETF AUM', 'XRP ETF tracker', 'BSOL ETF', 'XRPB ETF', 'ETHA ETF', 'crypto ETF comparison'.
Article schema (JSON-LD) with title, description, datePublished, author, wordCount added to learn guide.
FAQ schema (6 questions) added to learn guide — targeting People Also Ask placements for 'do Solana ETFs pay staking', 'cheapest Solana ETF', 'can I hold altcoin ETFs in IRA'.
BreadcrumbList schema added to learn guide via combineSchemas.
SoftwareApplication schema + FAQPage schema (4 questions) injected inline via dangerouslySetInnerHTML on tool page (client component pattern).
OG and Twitter card metadata set for both pages with distinct social copy.
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in src/lib/published-pages.ts under Day 28 group — indexed immediately.
Internal links in guide: → /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-etfs-guide, /learn/liquid-staking-derivatives, /tools/etf-tracker, /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide.
TypeScript check: 0 errors on all new files (pre-existing errors in unrelated files only).
